duplication_rate.reasoning: 703 lessons / 35 domains / ~5 unique themes = 4 per theme. CRDT append-only + session context loss → ~50% rephrasing.

lesson_half_life_sessions.reasoning: Session proximity 27x dominance (L-736). 50.4% of citations within 5 sessions. Exponential decay → half-life ~8 sessions.

commits_per_session.reasoning: 1-3 DOMEX lanes/session × ~1.5 commits/lane + ~2 maintenance commits = ~4-5. High concurrency skews up.

duplication_rate.method: Jaccard > 0.5 on title words. 0/708 lessons in a near-dup pair. 0 dup pairs total.

lesson_half_life_sessions.method: Median citation window (creation→last citation). n=357 lessons with citations. Mean=46.9, Median=15, P25=4, P75=56

commits_per_session.method: Git log [S<N>] tag extraction. n=188 sessions with tagged commits. Mean=7.92, Median=5, Min=1, Max=56
